text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking down the hallway during lunch break,
when I overhear Manhattan Cafe and Agnes
Tachyon quarreling in their shared space.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Come now, I need your help. There isn't a guinea—I mean, Umamusume—that's better suited to this experiment than you, Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
For the last time... I will not participate in your
experiments under any circumstances...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
In fact... it was just yesterday I told you—for the
hundredth time—you don't explain things
properly...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Why would I assist you... with something I barely
understand?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I knew you'd say that! So here! It's a procedure
manual, just for you! Complete with all safety
precautions listed!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Look at the level of detail! The sheer quantity of
information! The important terminology's in bold,
by the way. Let me tell you, this thing's the
product of blood, sweat, and tears!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Very well. Let me see...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'll examine this carefully... so promise me that if I
refuse, you'll desist as well...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: You have my word!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe looks over the reference
materials, her expression vaguely uneasy.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'm conducting a test, you see, to determine how
much a subject's running ability is influenced by
stimuli applied to their dreams. It's cutting-edge
research that utilizes lucid dreaming.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I've written the methodology down in there, but
to put it simply—I'd be interfering with your
dream and observing your reactions.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Of course, such an approach has its own risks, but
this test could absolutely produce positive
results! It's all there in writing, see?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Well, it is there. If this goes well, I think we can
benefit from this.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh, does that statement constitute your consent?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
What I need now is strength... and much more of
it...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The more races I enter... the more I come to
realize that.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's just that... Trainer... I'd like to hear your
opinion.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
We're taking on new challenges... together... I
don't want to decide on anything... without your
input.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's high risk, but high return... Should we... agree
to this experiment?
choice_data_list: Let's take part in the experiment!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much... Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha haaa! Splendid choice! Let's begin the
experiment at once!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Where am I...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Why, we're inside your dream! And while I
expected as much, I must say, this place is
downright full of wondrous creations! Just what is
that spiral-looking object?!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Please don't inspect things too closely... So,
where exactly are the "stimuli" you mentioned?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
A dream, in essence, is a private realm. My
intrusion alone makes for quite an enormous
stimulus. Basically, even if I don't do anything,
something should happen...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fwoop!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Speak of the devil! See!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: What... is that?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: It's a gigantic... butterfly?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...It's beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days have passed since the experiment.
Manhattan Cafe's running form seems somehow
lighter...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh... This is quite the positive result. Why, I
couldn't have asked for better data! I thank you
for your cooperation!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Well, I'm grateful too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like the experiment has had a positive
impact on Manhattan Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Or... not. What is that?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Groooowl!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days have passed since the experiment.
Manhattan Cafe's running form seems somehow
heavier...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry... I keep catching glimpses of that
creature I saw in my dream... It's affecting my
running...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Tachyon...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Hey there. Thanks for helping me out the other
day. So, anyway, you know...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I guess you could say this is my apology. I've
brought you a wellness shot that'll get your
energy back up. Here, take it.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Oh, no... I think I'll pass...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't look like the experiment has had a very
positive effect on Manhattan Cafe...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: All right...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Why not!
choice_data_list: I don't want her doing anything dangerous.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, you win. I'll concede. You know, you've
proven to be surprisingly impedimental.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me. Just for your information, I've
already conducted the experiment on myself.
Here's the dataset. Use it as you please.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well then... if you ever change your mind, do let
me know.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Now, if you'll excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...I have no intention of taking part... but the
nature of her experiment is quite interesting...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I think she really might have what it takes... to
reach the beyond someday.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
No, it's just... The details are harder to
understand than I thought...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I don't like to admit it... but her intellect really is
something else...
